task.title: RabbitMQ Task Queue Setup
task.description: Deploy RabbitMQ operator for integration delivery task queues

implementation.details:
1. Install RabbitMQ operator
2. Create RabbitMQ cluster with 1 instance
3. Configure queues for each integration type
4. Set up dead letter queues
5. Configure management UI access

task.acceptance_criteria: RabbitMQ is running, management UI accessible, can publish/consume messages, DLQs are configured
